errors: [The ELM implementation is missing the check for elevated total cholesterol (a component of dyslipidemia) in the HasCVDRRiskFactors expression. The CPG requires dyslipidemia to include elevated LDL, low HDL, OR elevated total cholesterol, but the ELM only checks LDL >130 mg/dL and HDL <40 mg/dL. This omits the total cholesterol criterion, which could lead to incomplete identification of patients with dyslipidemia.]

[The ELM implementation is missing the "Encounter to Screen for Depression" value set check (2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.1916) from the inclusion criteria. The CPG requires a qualifying encounter during the measurement period, but this condition is not implemented in the ELM logic. All other numeric values (age 12, 1-year screening interval) and logical operators (AND/OR/NOT) match the requirements.]
[Minimum Age requirement mismatch (CPG: 18 years, ELM: 25 years), Encounter LookBack interval mismatch (CPG: 12 months, ELM: 6 months)]
["Age range upper limit is 80 years in ELM but CPG specifies 85 years"]
[The HbA1c Laboratory Test criteria in ELM uses a value of 9 g% instead of the required 6.5% specified in the CPG. The unit "g%" in ELM does not match the expected unit "%" for HbA1c measurement.]

[Minimum Age in ELM is set to 60 instead of 45 as per CPG. Time interval for recent screening checks 2 years instead of 1 year. Rationale output is always null in ELM, but CPG requires non-null rationale when screening is needed.]
[Time interval for recent anxiety screening is 6 months in ELM but should be 1 year as per CPG. Rationale is set to null in ELM when screening is needed, but CPG requires specific rationale text.]
[Age lower bound in ELM is 30 instead of 15, no upper age bound check for 65, rationale is always null instead of providing specified text when InPopulation=true]

[BMI threshold in ELM is 35 kg/m2 instead of 25 kg/m2 as required by CPG; time interval for recent test is 1 year instead of 3 years in ELM; Rationale output is incorrectly set to null when InPopulation is true (should provide specified rationale text)]
["In Demographic" expression checks age >= 30 instead of 21 as specified in CPG requirements. The lower age bound in ELM (30) does not match CPG inclusion criteria (21).]
["In Demographic" expression checks for age >=75 instead of age >=65 as specified in the CPG requirements. The numeric value 75 in ELM does not match the required value 65.]

["In the ELM, the 'In Demographic' expression incorrectly checks for age >= 25 instead of age >= 18 as specified in the CPG requirements. This numeric mismatch violates the inclusion criteria for the target population."]

["Has Recent DEXA Scan" expression in ELM uses 6 months interval instead of 2 years as specified in CPG requirements. The ELM contains: "Subtract... 6 months" but CPG requires "DEXA scan in past 2 years".]

["In the 'In Demographic' expression, the lower age threshold is incorrectly set to 55 years instead of 65 years as specified in the CPG requirements. The ELM uses 'GreaterOrEqual' with value 55, but the CPG mandates 65 as the minimum age for inclusion."]

[The logical structure in the ELM incorrectly uses an OR operator for "Screening Age" and "Gender" in the `MeetsInclusionCriteria` calculation. The CPG requires all inclusion criteria (age >=40, female sex, and no mammogram in the past year) to be true via AND, but the ELM combines "Screening Age" and "Gender" with OR before applying AND with "Mammogram". This would incorrectly include patients who meet either age or gender (but not both) and no recent mammogram, violating the CPG requirements.]

["Needs Tobacco Use Screening" expression in ELM only includes "In Demographic" (age >=18) but is missing the critical exclusion of recent tobacco screening (within 1 year with result). The logical AND between age criteria and absence of recent screening is not implemented. "InPopulation" is incorrectly based solely on age instead of combining age with no recent screening.]

[The ELM implementation is missing the exclusion criteria for active Bipolar Disorder diagnosis in the "Needs Depression Screening" logic. The CPG requires checking for no active Bipolar Disorder (value set 2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.450), but this condition is not included in the ELM's decision logic for determining screening eligibility.]

[The "Colonoscopy" expression in the ELM uses a "Greater" operator to check if the count of procedures in the past 1 month is > 0. However, per the CPG requirements, screening is **not needed** if a colonoscopy exists in the past 1 month. The logic should instead check if the count is **= 0** (no procedures) to meet inclusion criteria. The current implementation inverts the exclusion logic, leading to incorrect population eligibility determination.]

["Needs Falls Prevention Screening" logic incorrectly combines In Demographic AND Has Recent Falls Assessment (should be In Demographic AND NOT Has Recent Falls Assessment). The CPG requires screening when there is NO recent assessment, but the ELM's current logic would trigger screening only when a recent assessment exists.]
["Value set ID for 'Fall Risk Assessment' in ELM (2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.564) does not match CPG requirement (2.16.840.1.113883.3.464.1003.118.12.1028)"]

[The value set ID for "Alcohol Use Screening" in the ELM (2.16.840.1.113883.3.526.3.1278) does not match the CPG requirement (2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.1542). The time interval logic for recent screening (1 year) is correctly implemented.]
